svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="多租户AI助手一次对话时序" id="ai-seq"> <mxGraphModel dx="-569" dy="-212" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="P_U" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="运营前端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_U" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="90" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="聊天接口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_C" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_S" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="编排服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="380" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_S" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="440" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="模型工厂" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="560" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_F" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_M" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="大模型(租户)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="740" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_M" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="810" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_T" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="业务工具" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="940" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_T" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1000" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="POST /chat(content, stream)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="90" y="120" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="120" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="orchestrate(tenantId, userId, ...)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="168" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="168" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="getOrCreate(tenantId)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="440" y="216" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="216" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="ChatModel(命中缓存 or 新建)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="264" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="264" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="stream(prompt + toolCallbacks)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="440" y="312" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="312" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="query_orders(自动)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="810" y="360" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="360" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="订单数据"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1000" y="408" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="810" y="408" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="Flux<增量文本>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="810" y="456" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="456" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="Flux<String>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="440" y="504" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="504" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="SSE delta(打字机效果)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="552" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="552" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="SSE done(conversationId)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="600" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="600" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：实线箭头 = 调用 / 同步请求；虚线箭头 = 异步返回值（含 Flux 流式与 SSE 推送）。模型工厂按 tenantId 缓存 ChatModel，业务工具通过编排服务注入的租户上下文做数据隔离。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1030" x="30" y="635" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 图例：实线箭头 = 调用 / 同步请求；虚线箭头 = 异步返回值（含 Flux 流式与 SSE 推送）。模型工厂按 tenantId 缓存 ChatModel，业务工具通过编排服务注入的租户上下文做数据隔离。
